feat.name: Natural Magnetism
feat.special: If you chose the gildedsoul lineage, you can replace one of the above spells with *enthrall*.
feat.text: Your connection with elemental iron grants you a natural field of weak magnetic attraction. You can cast *magnetic attraction* and *magnetic repulsion* once per day each as 2nd-rank primal innate spells.

traits.name: Talos
traits.text: Taloses are planar scions descended from zuhras.
